code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut x = n
  mut s = ""
  while x >= 10
    s = "#{s}X"
    x = x - 10
  end
  if x >= 9
    s = "#{s}IX"
    x = x - 9
  else if x >= 5
    s = "#{s}V"
    x = x - 5
  else if x >= 4
    s = "#{s}IV"
    x = x - 4
  end
  while x >= 1
    s = "#{s}I"
    x = x - 1
  end
  s
end

print(to_roman(4))
print(to_roman(9))
print(to_roman(27))
print(to_roman(39))
